title: ICRISAT Annual Report 1991
abstract: ICRISAT Report 1991 is the Institute's progress report intended to reach diverse range of readers. The publication includes the Director General's account of 1991 research highlights, and four designated themes that illustrate the Institute's progress in the recent pasf: Agroclimatic Zoning; Agroforestry and Perennial Systems; Crop Utilization; and Genetic Resources and Gennplasm Enliancement. Appendices include Financial Highlights, a list of published work by the Institute's staff during the year, and a list of senior staff. A supplement covering the achievements of the 20 years of the Institute's history is incorporated.
